title: Mushroom Villager Trader
description: Adds a new Mushroom Villager with new items and a new structure
body:
This Mod adds a new villager to the game, the Mushroom Trader.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c311898c9bb66908b2903ed443ef5565ddceb16_0.webp)

You will find him in his Giant Mushroom House which can spawn in dark forests or in mushroom fields.
You can also get him by placing one of the 2 new traderblocks as his workstation.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e98d5c8fb8ff9bb180e91e18a1d4e981d7b16e0f_0.webp)

 **The major features include:**

-  a new structure to explore, loot and trade.
-  a new profession with custom trades
-  a completely new armor
-  a mushroom sword and axe
-  3 new food items with some effects
  


You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
